3281390.name: Night of the Iron Dead
3281390.description:
Night of the Iron Dead delivers classic, round-based survival where you’ll face endless waves of robots. Rack up points with each kill, grab power-ups, and use your resources to buy weapons off the wall as you battle through each round.

Core Features:

  • Endless Waves – Each wave ramps up the challenge, testing your skills and endurance.

  • Power-Ups and Wall Buys – Boost your chances with power-ups and pick up weapons from wall buys as you go.

  • Perks and Mystery Box – Mix up your loadout with different perks and mystery box weapons.

  • Robot Enemies – These bots are relentless and will hunt you down each round.

Hold the line and see how many rounds you can survive in Night of the Iron Dead.
3281390.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
